data.description: The damage first so creature takes damage. the Multiple instances resistance vulnerability that affect same For has a example, if creature resistance fire as well resistance ali the

When damage reduces you to 0 hit points, either outright or unconscious, explained. Instant death can occur from massive damage that kills instantly. When damage reduces you to 0 hit points and the remaining damage equals your maximum hit points or exceeds it, you die. For example, a cleric with 12 maximum hit points who has 6 current hit points and takes 18 damage from an attack is reduced to 0 hit points with 12 remaining damage. Because the remaining damage equals the hit point maximum, the cleric dies.
